what_it_does: This file is a ledger-style metadata record for an image asset named p-06 in the design-source channel, labeling it as source design ground-truth for a slide in presentation-15p.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, dimensions, source, author_session, created, and an empty links array.
The image is declared as mime image/jpeg but with w:0 and h:0.
The body line states 'SOURCE design ground-truth — presentation-15p/p-06.jpg'.
standouts: Declared image dimensions are 0x0 despite image/jpeg mime.
The file is explicitly tagged as 'SOURCE design ground-truth'.
No descriptive caption or visual content description is provided.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for ledger metadata.
Id and path follow a presentation-15p/p-06 naming scheme.
Address uses an image://design-source/ URI scheme.
Source field is set to design_source_material.
concerns: Width and height are zero, which is suspicious for an image record.
No links or descriptive content make the file a thin stub.
The actual visual content and role of the slide are not described.
notes: A thin metadata stub for a design-source JPEG slide asset with zero dimensions and no descriptive caption.
questions: What visual content does p-06 contain?
Why are the width and height recorded as 0?
Does the referenced blob actually exist and what are its true dimensions?
What is the intended slide order or role within presentation-15p?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record a design-source image asset as ground truth; actual content is only a metadata stub with missing dimensions and no visual description, so it partially matches.
intention_signals: It appears intended to catalog and preserve the identity and provenance of a source image used as ground truth for a slide in a 15-page presentation.
contribution: Provides a stable, content-addressed identifier and channel classification for a design-source image asset, supporting retrieval and provenance tracking within a fused ledger.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a ledger metadata record for a design-source JPEG image named p-06, part of presentation-15p, with a blob reference and zero declared dimensions.
intention_for_embedding: It was meant to catalog and preserve the provenance of a source image used as ground truth in a 15-page presentation.
